global_design_principles: Eliminate all dark navy, teal, 3D glassmorphism, and aurora motifs.
Rely on pure whites, subtle slate borders, and precise indigo accents.
Stripe-like UI: sharp 1px borders, 0 1px 2px soft shadows, flat surfaces.
HIPAA-aware: calm, no anxiety-triggering reds unless strictly for SOS/Urgent alerts.

primary.usage: Main actions, active states, active tab

background_app.usage: Global app background behind the max-w-md container and inside it

spacing_and_layout.container: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-slate-50 relative shadow-xl overflow-hidden (for desktop frame)
spacing_and_layout.page_padding: px-4 pt-4 pb-24 (to account for bottom nav)

components.card: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-[0_1px_2px_rgba(16,24,40,0.06)] p-4
components.button_primary: w-full inline-flex items-center justify-center px-4 py-2.5 bg-indigo-600 text-white text-sm font-medium rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:bg-indigo-700 transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:ring-offset-2
components.button_secondary: w-full inline-flex items-center justify-center px-4 py-2.5 bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 text-sm font-medium rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-500 focus:ring-offset-2
components.input: w-full px-3 py-2 bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg text-sm text-slate-900 placeholder-slate-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500/20 focus:border-indigo-500 transition-all shadow-sm
components.badge_default: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 border border-slate-200
components.badge_urgent: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-rose-50 text-rose-700 border border-rose-200
components.badge_active: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border border-emerald-200
components.top_bar: sticky top-0 z-50 h-14 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-200 flex items-center justify-between px-4
components.bottom_nav: fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-md h-16 bg-white border-t border-slate-200 flex justify-around items-center px-2 z-50 pb-safe

ClinicianAppShell.layout: Wraps all views. Contains TopBar (Logo + Role Badge + Profile Pic/Signout) and BottomNav (Home, Patients, AI, Notes, Settings).
ClinicianAppShell.header_replacement: Replace all custom eyebrow text on individual pages with a unified top bar displaying contextual title.

ClinicianHomeMobile.hero: No aggressive 'Command Center' text. Clean greeting like 'Good morning, Dr. Smith' or 'Dashboard'.
ClinicianHomeMobile.stats_grid: grid grid-cols-2 gap-3. Each tile uses the standard card design. Values are large (data_value).
ClinicianHomeMobile.urgent_feed: List of urgent patients below stats. Minimalist rows with red severity dots or subtle red badges.

ClinicianPatientsMobile.search_bar: Sticky below top header. Uses standard input with leading Lucide search icon.
ClinicianPatientsMobile.list_items: Cards (p-3) containing patient name, severity chip, last seen date, and a ghost CTA 'View Roadmap' (text-indigo-600 text-sm font-medium).

ClinicianRecommendations.anchor_reference: Already clean. Ensure it uses pure white cards and slate-200 borders to match the new ecosystem.

ClinicianAICoach.layout: Chat interface. White background for the entire page.
ClinicianAICoach.ai_bubble: bg-slate-100 text-slate-900 p-3 rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm border border-slate-200
ClinicianAICoach.user_bubble: bg-indigo-600 text-white p-3 rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm shadow-sm
ClinicianAICoach.input_area: Fixed above bottom nav. border-t border-slate-200 bg-white p-3.

ClinicianNotesMobile.editor: SOAP structure inside a single card or distinct section cards. Autosave indicated by a tiny green dot + 'Saved' text in the header.

ClinicianAnalytics.charts: Recharts. Remove dark themes. Grid lines should be stroke-slate-100. Tooltips bg-white shadow-md border-slate-200.

ClinicianSubscribe.cards: Pricing tiers. Free trial card prominent. Selected plan uses ring-2 ring-indigo-600 bg-indigo-50/50.

ClinicianSettingsMobile.list: Grouped list items (iOS style) inside a white card with divide-y divide-slate-100.

ClinicianNotifications.feed: Timeline format. Unread items have a faint bg-indigo-50 background.

PatientRoadmap.timeline: Vertical line (border-l-2 border-slate-200). Nodes are white circles with slate borders. Current/Active node uses indigo-600.

ClinicianPatientHistory.layout: Data dense but breathable. Use tabs (Shadcn style, no borders, just an underline or segmented control) to switch between Notes, Vitals, Assessments.

animation_guidance.page_transitions: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.2 }}
animation_guidance.tap_feedback: whileTap={{ scale: 0.98 }} (for primary buttons and cards)
animation_guidance.bottom_sheet: initial={{ y: '100%' }} animate={{ y: 0 }} transition={{ type: 'spring', damping: 25, stiffness: 200 }}

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Replace all dark navy/teal classes with the new white/slate/indigo palette mapping provided above.
2. Remove all 3D glassmorphic elements (backdrop-blur with dark overlays) and decorative motifs (auroras).
3. Implement the new 'Stripe/Linear' card look globally: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-[0_1px_2px_rgba(16,24,40,0.06)].
4. Ensure the UI fits within a max-w-md mx-auto container for the mobile-first layout that scales gracefully.
5. ONLY use Lucide icons for iconography.
6. MUST preserve all existing data-testid attributes to prevent breaking automated tests. Apply data-testid to new interactive elements.
7. All interactive elements must have clear hover and focus states (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500/20).
8. Write code for standard .js files (React + Tailwind), NOT .tsx.
